html:
Exclusive to:

Moon Quay Pirate Banners are a type of structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found on Moon Quay as well as on Pirate Sloops.

Pirate Banners can be crafted using a Black Flag and two Logs once its Blueprint is obtained. The blueprint has a 50% chance of appearing in a Pirate Stash.

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Moon Quay Pirate Banner
"Ape the monkey marauders with a pirate flag of your own."
Object Info
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Moon Quay
Crafting
×1 ×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"pirate_flag_pole"
“Ahoy!”
–Wilson
“It would look a lot cooler with flames around it.”
–Willow
“Is monkey flag!”
–Wolfgang
“Those monkeys have no imagination. I've seen more macabre children's drawings.”
–Wendy
“I WANT A FLAG WITH MY FACE ON IT”
–WX-78
“Oh dear. That does not bode well.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like some kinda pirate flag, eh?”
–Woodie
“That's not exactly a welcome sight.”
–Maxwell
“The banner of the monkey raiders!”
–Wigfrid
“It's a pirate flag!”
–Webber
“Mon dieu! Pirates!”
–Warly
“Friend holding picture”
–Wormwood
“They're surprisingly artistic for a bunch of monkeys.”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, that flag spells trouble!”
–Wortox
“Ooooh... want flag too!”
–Wurt
“It's pretty good, but the Pinetree Pioneer flag looks better.”
–Walter
“As if sea-faring wasn't hazardous enough, now there are pirates to contend with?”
–Wanda
Moon Quay Pirate Banners are a type of structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found on Moon Quay as well as on Pirate Sloops.
Pirate Banners can be crafted using a Black Flag and two Logs once its Blueprint is obtained. The blueprint has a 50% chance of appearing in a Pirate Stash.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cờ Cướp Biển Moon Quay là một loại cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật The Curse of Moon Quay. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy trên Moon Quay cũng như trên Pirate Sloops.
title: Moon Quay Pirate Banner

'''Moon Quay Pirate Banners''' are a type of [[structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. They can be found on [[Moon Quay]] as well as on [[Pirate Sloop]]s. 

Pirate Banners can be [[Crafting|crafted]] using a [[Black Flag]] and two [[Log]]s once its [[Blueprint]] is obtained. The blueprint has a 50% chance of appearing in a [[Pirate Stash]].
